name: Jailbreak Assault
short_description: In Jailbreak Assault, you’re a prisoner on a daring mission to break free. Start with a key and a baton, outwit guards, destroy documents, and disable security systems. Arm yourself for the ultimate challenge: escaping the heavily fortified perimeter.
detailed_description:
Break Free or Be Captured Again

In Jailbreak Assault, you take on the role of a daring prisoner determined to escape against all odds. From the confines of your cell, you'll use your cunning and skill to outsmart guards and make your way to freedom.

Start with a dropped key, unlock your cell, and arm yourself with whatever you can find—starting with a baton. Fight off guards, destroy sensitive documents, disable security cameras, and uncover new pathways as you progress through a series of intense missions.

As you break deeper into the facility, the stakes rise. Secure weapons from the armory and face the ultimate challenge: the heavily guarded outer perimeter. With every step closer to freedom, the opposition grows fiercer.

Key Features:

  • Dynamic Combat: Use melee weapons and firearms to battle guards and overcome challenges.

  • Strategic Gameplay: Destroy evidence, disable security systems, and uncover hidden pathways.

  • Mission-Based Progression: Each level presents new dangers and obstacles to overcome.

  • Immersive Atmosphere: Experience the tension of a high-stakes prison break.

Will you outwit your captors and taste freedom, or will you be dragged back into the darkness of your cell? The choice is yours in Jailbreak Assault.
